import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df = pd.read_csv("Intent1.csv")
df.columns = [c.strip() for c in df.columns]

# High-DPI for sharper charts
%config InlineBackend.figure_format = 'retina'

In [10]:
total_calls = df["Total Volume"].sum()
auto_calls = df["Automated Volume"].sum()
agent_calls = total_calls - auto_calls

# Pie chart
plt.figure(figsize=(5,5))
plt.pie(
    [auto_calls, agent_calls],
    labels=["Automated", "Agent"],
    autopct='%1.1f%%',
    startangle=90
)
plt.title("Week 1 Calls: Automated vs Agent")
plt.axis("equal")
plt.show()
In [11]:
# Chart settings
exclude_intent = ["Totals"]                      # filter out irrelevant intent
title = "Which intents have the highest automated volume (Week 1)"
bar_colour = "#620dec"                       # Flip CX Main colour

d0 = df[~df["Intent"].isin(exclude_intent)].copy()
d0 = d0.dropna(subset=["Intent"])
d0["Automated Volume"] = pd.to_numeric(d0["Automated Volume"], errors="coerce")
d0 = d0.sort_values("Automated Volume", ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)

y = np.arange(len(d0))
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 8))
bars = ax.barh(y, d0["Automated Volume"].fillna(0), color=bar_colour)

ax.set_yticks(y)
ax.set_yticklabels(d0["Intent"])
ax.invert_yaxis()
ax.set_xlabel("Automated Volume")
ax.set_title(title, y = 1.02)

vmax = np.nanmax(d0["Automated Volume"].values) if d0["Automated Volume"].notna().any() else 1.0
ax.set_xlim(0, vmax * 1.1)

for i, v in enumerate(d0["Automated Volume"].values):
    if pd.notna(v):
        ax.text(v + vmax*0.01, i, f"{v:,.0f}", va="center", fontsize=8, color=bar_colour)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [12]:
# Chart settings
exclude_intent= ["Totals"]               # filter out irrelevant intent
left_label = "Automated Volume"          # left metric label
right_label = "Automation %"             # right metric label
title = "Which intents drive the highest automation rates? (Week 1)"
left_colour  = "#620dec"                 # Flip CX main Colour
right_colour = "#d9d9d9"                 # Light gray

# === 1) Filter + coerce ===
d = df[~df["Intent"].isin(exclude_intent)].copy()
d = d.dropna(subset=["Intent"])

# numeric safety for percent
d["Automation %"] = (
    d["Automation %"].astype(str).str.replace("%","", regex=False)
      .str.strip().replace("", np.nan).astype(float)
)

# === 2) Sort for readability ===
d = d.sort_values("Automated Volume", ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)

# === 3) Build grouped horizontal bars with twin x-axes ===
y = np.arange(len(d))
h = 0.4
off = h/2

fig, ax1 = plt.subplots(figsize=(10,8))

# Left bar: Volume
ax1.barh(y - off, d["Automated Volume"].fillna(0), height=h, color=left_colour, label=left_label)

# Right bar: Percent
ax2 = ax1.twiny()
ax2.barh(y + off, d["Automation %"].fillna(0), height=h*0.7, color=right_colour, alpha=0.9, label=right_label)

# Axes, ticks, title
ax1.set_xlabel(left_label)
ax2.set_xlabel(right_label)
ax1.set_ylabel("Intent")
ax1.set_yticks(y)
ax1.set_yticklabels(d["Intent"])
ax1.invert_yaxis()
ax1.set_title(title, y=1.08)

# Safe limits
vmax = np.nanmax(d["Automated Volume"].values) if d["Automated Volume"].notna().any() else 1.0
pmax = np.nanmax(d["Automation %"].values)      if d["Automation %"].notna().any()      else 1.0
ax1.set_xlim(0, vmax*1.1)
ax2.set_xlim(0, pmax*1.1)

# Data labels (NaN-safe)
for i, v in enumerate(d["Automated Volume"].values):
    if pd.notna(v):
        ax1.text(v + vmax*0.01, i - off, f"{v:,.0f}", va="center", fontsize=8, color=left_colour)

for i, v in enumerate(d["Automation %"].values):
    if pd.notna(v):
        ax2.text(v + pmax*0.01, i + off, f"{v:.1f}%", va="center", fontsize=8, color="black")

# Unified legend
lines, labels = [], []
for ax in (ax1, ax2):
    lns, lbs = ax.get_legend_handles_labels()
    lines += lns; labels += lbs
ax1.legend(lines, labels, loc="upper center", bbox_to_anchor=(0.5,-0.08), ncol=2, frameon=False)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [13]:
# chart settings
exclude_intents = ["Totals"]        # do not exclude "request representative" or "unable to understand"
x_field   = "Total Volume"
y_field   = "Automation %"
x_label   = "Total volume"
y_label   = "Automation %"
title     = "Intent Opportunity Matrix (Week 1)"

# filter + coerce
d = df[~df["Intent"].isin(exclude_intents)].copy()
d = d.dropna(subset=["Intent"])
d[x_field] = pd.to_numeric(d[x_field], errors="coerce")
d[y_field] = (
    d[y_field].astype(str).str.replace("%","", regex=False)
      .str.strip().replace("", np.nan).astype(float)
)
d = d.dropna(subset=[x_field, y_field]).copy()

# quadrant thresholds
x_thresh = d[x_field].median()
use_median_for_auto = False
y_thresh = d[y_field].median() if use_median_for_auto else 50.0

# color by quadrant
def quadrant(row, vx=x_thresh, vy=y_thresh):
    v = "HighVol" if row[x_field] >= vx else "LowVol"
    a = "HighAuto" if row[y_field] >= vy else "LowAuto"
    return f"{v}-{a}"

d["Quadrant"] = d.apply(quadrant, axis=1)
color_map = {
    "HighVol-HighAuto": "#2ca02c",  # hero / maintain
    "HighVol-LowAuto":  "#d62728",  # priority to lift automation
    "LowVol-HighAuto":  "#1f77b4",  # monitor
    "LowVol-LowAuto":   "#ff7f0e"   # low impact
}
colors = d["Quadrant"].map(color_map).fillna("#7f7f7f")

# bubble sizes (proportional to total volume)
size_base = d[x_field].fillna(0)
sizes = 40 + 160 * (size_base / (size_base.max() if size_base.max() > 0 else 1))

# build scatter (no dot labels)
plt.figure(figsize=(9,6))
plt.scatter(
    d[x_field].values, d[y_field].values,
    s=sizes.values, c=colors.values,
    edgecolors="k", linewidths=0.5, alpha=0.9
)

# axis + title
plt.title(title, fontsize=13, fontweight="bold", y=1.06)
plt.xlabel(x_label)
plt.ylabel(y_label)
plt.xlim(0, d[x_field].max() * 1.05)
plt.ylim(0, max(10, d[y_field].max() * 1.05))

# quadrant guides
plt.axvline(x_thresh, linestyle="--", color="#aaaaaa", linewidth=1)
plt.axhline(y_thresh, linestyle="--", color="#aaaaaa", linewidth=1)

# legend outside
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
legend_patches = [
    mpatches.Patch(color=color_map["HighVol-HighAuto"], label="High vol/High auto (Hero)"),
    mpatches.Patch(color=color_map["HighVol-LowAuto"],  label="High vol/Low auto (Priority)"),
    mpatches.Patch(color=color_map["LowVol-HighAuto"],  label="Low vol/High auto (Monitor)"),
    mpatches.Patch(color=color_map["LowVol-LowAuto"],   label="Low vol/Low auto (Low impact)"),
]
plt.legend(handles=legend_patches, loc="upper center", bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.14),
           ncol=2, frameon=False)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

# priority tables to narrate
print("\nPriority Fix (HighVol-LowAuto):")
print(d[d["Quadrant"]=="HighVol-LowAuto"]
      .sort_values(x_field, ascending=False)
      [["Intent", x_field, y_field]]
      .to_string(index=False))

print("\nMaintain (HighVol-HighAuto):")
print(d[d["Quadrant"]=="HighVol-HighAuto"]
      .sort_values(x_field, ascending=False)
      [["Intent", x_field, y_field]]
      .to_string(index=False))

Priority Fix (HighVol-LowAuto):
                 Intent  Total Volume  Automation %
 Request Representative         12500           0.0
           Cancel Order         12000          47.0
   Unable to Understand         10000           0.0
           Update Order         10000          46.0
Delivery/Shipping Issue          9000          44.0

Maintain (HighVol-HighAuto):
      Intent  Total Volume  Automation %
Order Status         15000          60.0
In [14]:
# Lọc bỏ các intent không có recontact
exclude_intents = ["Request Representative", "Unable to Understand"]
df_re = df[~df["Intent"].isin(exclude_intents)].copy()

# Chuyển đổi cột % sang số (nếu chưa numeric)
df_re["Overall %"] = df_re["Overall %"].astype(str).str.replace("%", "", regex=False).astype(float)

# Tổng cộng volume
total_auto = df_re["Automated Volume"].sum()
total_recontact = df_re["Overall Recontact"].sum()
overall_re_rate = (total_recontact / total_auto) * 100 if total_auto > 0 else 0

# Vẽ Pie chart đơn giản, đúng màu bạn yêu cầu
plt.figure(figsize=(5,5))
plt.pie(
    [total_recontact, total_auto - total_recontact],
    labels=["Recontacted", "Resolved First Time"],
    autopct='%1.1f%%',
    startangle=90,
    colors=["#d9d9d9", "#620dec"]
)
plt.title("Overall CX Health (Week 1)", fontsize=15, fontweight="bold", y=1.08)
plt.axis("equal")
plt.show()
In [15]:
# chart settings
exclude_intents = ["Totals", "Request Representative", "Unable to Understand"]
left_label  = "Overall Recontact"
title = "Which intents drive the most recontact volume? (Week 1)"
left_colour  = "#620dec"

# 1) filter + coerce
d = df[~df["Intent"].isin(exclude_intents)].copy()
d = d.dropna(subset=["Intent"])
d["Overall Recontact"] = pd.to_numeric(d["Overall Recontact"], errors="coerce")

# 2) sort descending
d = d.sort_values("Overall Recontact", ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)

# 3) build simple horizontal bar chart
y = np.arange(len(d))
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(9,7))

ax.barh(y, d["Overall Recontact"].fillna(0), color=left_colour, alpha=0.9)

# axis + title
ax.set_xlabel(left_label)
ax.set_ylabel("Intent")
ax.set_yticks(y)
ax.set_yticklabels(d["Intent"])
ax.invert_yaxis()
ax.set_title(title, y=1.02)

# limits + labels
vmax = np.nanmax(d["Overall Recontact"].values) if d["Overall Recontact"].notna().any() else 1.0
ax.set_xlim(0, vmax*1.1)

for i, v in enumerate(d["Overall Recontact"].values):
    if pd.notna(v):
        ax.text(v + vmax*0.01, i, f"{v:,.0f}", va="center", fontsize=8, color="black")

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [16]:
# Chart settings
exclude_intents = ["Totals", "Request Representative", "Unable to Understand"]
left_label  = "Overall Recontact"
right_label = "Recontact %"
title = "Which intent drive highest recontact rates (Week 1)"
left_colour  = "#620dec"
right_colour = "#d9d9d9"

# === 1) Filter + coerce ===
d = df[~df["Intent"].isin(exclude_intents)].copy()
d = d.dropna(subset=["Intent"])

# numeric safety for percent
d["Overall %"] = (
    d["Overall %"].astype(str).str.replace("%","", regex=False)
      .str.strip().replace("", np.nan).astype(float)
)

# === 2) Sort for readability ===
d = d.sort_values("Overall Recontact", ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)

# === 3) Build grouped horizontal bars with twin x-axes ===
y = np.arange(len(d))
h = 0.4
off = h/2

fig, ax1 = plt.subplots(figsize=(10,8))

# Left bar: Recontact volume
ax1.barh(y - off, d["Overall Recontact"].fillna(0), height=h, color=left_colour, label=left_label)

# Right bar: Recontact percent
ax2 = ax1.twiny()
ax2.barh(y + off, d["Overall %"].fillna(0), height=h*0.7, color=right_colour, alpha=0.9, label=right_label)

# Axes, ticks, title
ax1.set_xlabel(left_label)
ax2.set_xlabel(right_label)
ax1.set_ylabel("Intent")
ax1.set_yticks(y)
ax1.set_yticklabels(d["Intent"])
ax1.invert_yaxis()
ax1.set_title(title, y=1.08)

# Safe limits
vmax = np.nanmax(d["Overall Recontact"].values) if d["Overall Recontact"].notna().any() else 1.0
pmax = np.nanmax(d["Overall %"].values)         if d["Overall %"].notna().any()         else 1.0
ax1.set_xlim(0, vmax*1.1)
ax2.set_xlim(0, pmax*1.1)

# Data labels (NaN-safe)
for i, v in enumerate(d["Overall Recontact"].values):
    if pd.notna(v):
        ax1.text(v + vmax*0.01, i - off, f"{v:,.0f}", va="center", fontsize=8, color=left_colour)

for i, v in enumerate(d["Overall %"].values):
    if pd.notna(v):
        ax2.text(v + pmax*0.01, i + off, f"{v:.1f}%", va="center", fontsize=8, color="black")

# Unified legend
lines, labels = [], []
for ax in (ax1, ax2):
    lns, lbs = ax.get_legend_handles_labels()
    lines += lns; labels += lbs
ax1.legend(lines, labels, loc="upper center", bbox_to_anchor=(0.5,-0.08), ncol=2, frameon=False)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [17]:
# chart settings
exclude_intents = ["Totals", "Request Representative", "Unable to Understand"]
title = "Automation Rate vs Recontact Rate (Week 1)"
point_colour = "#620dec"
trend_colour = "grey"

# prepare data
df_corr = df[~df["Intent"].isin(exclude_intents)].copy()
df_corr["Automation %"] = (
    df_corr["Automation %"].astype(str).str.replace("%", "", regex=False)
          .str.strip().replace("", np.nan).astype(float)
)
df_corr["Overall %"] = (
    df_corr["Overall %"].astype(str).str.replace("%", "", regex=False)
          .str.strip().replace("", np.nan).astype(float)
)
df_corr = df_corr.dropna(subset=["Automation %", "Overall %"]).copy()

# thresholds
auto_thresh = 50.0
recon_thresh = df_corr["Overall %"].median()

# scatter: x = recontact %, y = automation %
plt.figure(figsize=(8,6))
plt.scatter(
    df_corr["Overall %"],            # x
    df_corr["Automation %"],         # y
    s=70, color=point_colour, edgecolors="k", linewidths=0.5, alpha=0.9, label="intent"
)

# trendline (y = a*x + b)
z = np.polyfit(df_corr["Overall %"], df_corr["Automation %"], 1)
p = np.poly1d(z)
x_line = np.linspace(df_corr["Overall %"].min(), df_corr["Overall %"].max(), 100)
plt.plot(x_line, p(x_line), "-", color=trend_colour, linewidth=1, label="trendline")

# axes, guides, title
plt.title(title, fontsize=13, fontweight="bold", y=1.06)
plt.xlabel("recontact %")
plt.ylabel("automation %")
plt.xlim(0, max(12, df_corr["Overall %"].max() * 1.05))
plt.ylim(20, 65)
plt.axvline(recon_thresh, linestyle="--", color="#aaaaaa", linewidth=1)
plt.axhline(auto_thresh,   linestyle="--", color="#aaaaaa", linewidth=1)

# legend outside
plt.legend(loc="upper center", bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.12), ncol=2, frameon=False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

# priority group listings (for narration)
def quad(row, a_th=auto_thresh, r_th=recon_thresh):
    a = "HighAuto" if row["Automation %"] >= a_th else "LowAuto"
    r = "HighRecon" if row["Overall %"]   >= r_th else "LowRecon"
    return f"{a}-{r}"

df_corr["Quadrant"] = df_corr.apply(quad, axis=1)

print("\nPriority Fix (LowAuto & HighRecon) — tackle first:")
cols = ["Intent", "Automation %", "Overall %"]
if "Overall Recontact" in df_corr.columns:
    cols = ["Intent", "Overall Recontact", "Automation %", "Overall %"]
print(df_corr[df_corr["Quadrant"] == "LowAuto-HighRecon"]
      .sort_values(cols[1], ascending=False)[cols].to_string(index=False))

print("\nHighAuto but HighRecon (possible misfire) — improve logic/confirmation:")
print(df_corr[df_corr["Quadrant"] == "HighAuto-HighRecon"]
      .sort_values(cols[1], ascending=False)[cols].to_string(index=False))

# correlation for a one-line quote
if df_corr.shape[0] >= 2:
    corr = np.corrcoef(df_corr["Automation %"], df_corr["Overall %"])[0, 1]
    print(f"\nCorrelation (Automation %, Recontact %): {corr:.2f}")

Priority Fix (LowAuto & HighRecon) — tackle first:
                 Intent  Overall Recontact  Automation %  Overall %
           Cancel Order             1116.0          47.0       20.0
Delivery/Shipping Issue              937.0          44.0       24.0
     Account Management              332.0          49.0       23.0
      Technical Support              192.0          44.0       22.0

HighAuto but HighRecon (possible misfire) — improve logic/confirmation:
  Intent  Overall Recontact  Automation %  Overall %
Feedback               96.0          53.0       18.0

Correlation (Automation %, Recontact %): -0.69
In [18]:
# chart settings
exclude_intents = ["Totals", "Request Representative", "Unable to Understand"]
x_field   = "Total Volume"
y_field   = "Overall %"
x_label   = "total volume (week 1)"
y_label   = "recontact % (week 1)"
title     = "Recontact Opportunity Matrix"

# filter + coerce
d = df[~df["Intent"].isin(exclude_intents)].copy()
d = d.dropna(subset=["Intent"])
d[x_field] = pd.to_numeric(d[x_field], errors="coerce")
d[y_field] = (
    d[y_field].astype(str).str.replace("%","", regex=False)
      .str.strip().replace("", np.nan).astype(float)
)
d = d.dropna(subset=[x_field, y_field]).copy()

# quadrant thresholds (median-based)
x_thresh = d[x_field].median()
y_thresh = d[y_field].median()

# color by quadrant
def quadrant(row, vx=x_thresh, vy=y_thresh):
    v = "HighVol" if row[x_field] >= vx else "LowVol"
    r = "HighRecon" if row[y_field] >= vy else "LowRecon"
    return f"{v}-{r}"

d["Quadrant"] = d.apply(quadrant, axis=1)
color_map = {
    "HighVol-HighRecon": "#d62728",  # priority to reduce recontacts
    "HighVol-LowRecon":  "#2ca02c",  # hero / maintain
    "LowVol-HighRecon":  "#ff7f0e",  # minor pain
    "LowVol-LowRecon":   "#1f77b4"   # low impact
}
colors = d["Quadrant"].map(color_map).fillna("#7f7f7f")

# bubble sizes (prefer overall recontact if available, fallback to total volume)
if "Overall Recontact" in d.columns:
    size_base = pd.to_numeric(d["Overall Recontact"], errors="coerce").fillna(0)
else:
    size_base = d[x_field].fillna(0)
sizes = 40 + 160 * (size_base / (size_base.max() if size_base.max() > 0 else 1))

# build scatter (no dot labels)
plt.figure(figsize=(9,6))
plt.scatter(
    d[x_field].values, d[y_field].values,
    s=sizes.values, c=colors.values,
    edgecolors="k", linewidths=0.5, alpha=0.9
)

# axis + title
plt.title(title, fontsize=13, fontweight="bold", y=1.06)
plt.xlabel(x_label)
plt.ylabel(y_label)
plt.xlim(0, d[x_field].max() * 1.05)
plt.ylim(0, max(10, d[y_field].max() * 1.05))

# quadrant guides
plt.axvline(x_thresh, linestyle="--", color="#aaaaaa", linewidth=1)
plt.axhline(y_thresh, linestyle="--", color="#aaaaaa", linewidth=1)

# legend outside
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
legend_patches = [
    mpatches.Patch(color=color_map["HighVol-HighRecon"], label="High vol/High recontact (Priority)"),
    mpatches.Patch(color=color_map["HighVol-LowRecon"],  label="High vol/Low recontact (Hero)"),
    mpatches.Patch(color=color_map["LowVol-HighRecon"],  label="Low vol/High recontact (Monitor)"),
    mpatches.Patch(color=color_map["LowVol-LowRecon"],   label="Low vol/Low recontact (Low impact)"),
]
plt.legend(handles=legend_patches, loc="upper center", bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.14),
           ncol=2, frameon=False)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

# priority tables to narrate (using total volume)
print("\nPriority Fix (HighVol-HighRecon):")
print(d[d["Quadrant"]=="HighVol-HighRecon"]
      .sort_values(x_field, ascending=False)
      [["Intent", x_field, y_field]]
      .to_string(index=False))

print("\nMaintain (HighVol-LowRecon):")
print(d[d["Quadrant"]=="HighVol-LowRecon"]
      .sort_values(x_field, ascending=False)
      [["Intent", x_field, y_field]]
      .to_string(index=False))

Priority Fix (HighVol-HighRecon):
                 Intent  Total Volume  Overall %
           Cancel Order         12000       20.0
Delivery/Shipping Issue          9000       24.0

Maintain (HighVol-LowRecon):
         Intent  Total Volume  Overall %
   Order Status         15000        5.0
   Update Order         10000       12.0
Product Inquiry          8000       12.0
